user_gap: I don't know where to start.
resume_rule: After this quest is complete, return to the original project or goal that caused this quest unless you intentionally choose a different path.
title: Active Directory OU Proof Quest
goal: Prove you understand what an OU is by creating a visible OU structure in ADUC.
what_to_build: In Active Directory Users and Computers, create one OU named KDT_Practice, create a sub-OU named Workstations, and move one test user or computer object into the correct OU.
requirements: Open Active Directory Users and Computers
Move one test user or computer into an OU
Take a screenshot showing the OU tree
Write a short explanation in README.md
success_criteria: At least one object is shown inside the OU or explanation says why no object was available
README explains why OUs are useful
steps: Open Server Manager or Start Menu
Open Active Directory Users and Computers
Expand your domain in the left tree
Right-click the domain or a safe practice container
Right-click KDT_Practice and create a sub-OU named Workstations
Move one safe test user or computer into KDT_Practice or Workstations
Take a screenshot showing the domain tree and new OU
In README.md answer: What is an OU? Why not put everything in Users?
proof_required: Upload screenshot showing ADUC and KDT_Practice
Answer: What did the OU organize?
Answer: How would a GPO use this OU later?
